candidates.why: Best current financing-debt line on the balance sheet; excludes leases and represents short-term borrowings/current bank debt.
Supplemental debt maturity line could represent current portion of debt, but appears alongside current liabilities to credit institutions and may overlap, so not preferred to avoid double counting.
Appears to be broader debt/borrowing line and not explicitly current; likely overlaps with maturity schedule.
Facility availability rather than drawn short-term debt.
Current debt-like liability but explicitly lease-related and should be excluded by rule.
Lease maturity line and should be excluded from STD baseline.

variables.notes: Chose the clean current debt line and excluded lease liabilities. Did not add 'Debt due in 1 Year' to avoid likely double counting with current liabilities to credit institutions.
